title: Professional Design Upgrade for SkinCare Analyzer

requirements.summary: Upgrade typography system with professional font stack, weights, and hierarchy across all pages
acceptanceCriteria: All pages use a cohesive professional font stack with appropriate weights
Typography hierarchy is clear and consistent throughout the application
Line heights and spacing enhance readability
Headings use appropriate font sizes and weights to establish clear visual hierarchy

file_operations.description: Import and configure professional font stack (Inter or System UI). Define CSS custom properties for typography scales including font-size, font-weight, line-height, and letter-spacing variables for headings (h1-h6), body text, labels, and captions. Apply consistent typography hierarchy using Tailwind's @layer base directive.

Extend theme.fontFamily with professional sans-serif stack. Add theme.fontSize with refined scale including line-height pairs. Configure theme.fontWeight with appropriate weights (light, normal, medium, semibold, bold). Add theme.letterSpacing for improved readability.

requirements.summary: Refine color palette with sophisticated professional tones, proper contrast ratios, and consistent interactive element styling
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette includes refined professional tones with proper contrast
All interactive elements have consistent hover and active states
Colors meet WCAG accessibility standards for contrast
Badge colors for safety classifications maintain professional appearance while being distinguishable

file_operations.description: Refine CSS custom properties for the healthcare-inspired color palette. Add deeper accent tones and professional neutrals (gray-50 through gray-900) while maintaining the soft green base. Define semantic color tokens for success, warning, danger, and info states. Ensure all color combinations meet WCAG AA contrast standards. Add refined hover and active state colors for interactive elements.

Extend theme.colors to reference the refined CSS custom properties. Configure consistent color scales for primary, secondary, accent, neutral, success, warning, danger, and info. Ensure badge and classification colors are defined with appropriate opacity variants for backgrounds and borders.

requirements.summary: Upgrade card components with refined shadows, borders, spacing, and consistent elevation throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: All card components have consistent shadow depth and border radius
Cards have appropriate padding and spacing between elements
Hover states include smooth transitions and subtle elevation changes
Card layouts are visually balanced and professional

file_operations.description: Apply professional card styling with refined shadow (shadow-md), consistent border-radius (rounded-xl), appropriate padding (p-6), and smooth hover transitions including subtle elevation change (hover:shadow-lg). Ensure consistent spacing between card elements using gap utilities. Add transition-all duration-200 for smooth animations.

Apply professional card styling matching ProductCard with refined shadows, borders, and spacing. Ensure hover state includes smooth elevation change. Maintain consistent internal spacing and badge positioning. Add transition effects for professional micro-interactions.

Apply professional card styling consistent with ProductCard and IngredientCard. Refine shadow depth, border radius, padding, and hover transitions. Ensure category badge, title, and preview text have appropriate spacing and typography hierarchy.

Apply professional card styling to history cards with refined shadows (shadow-md), consistent border-radius (rounded-xl), and appropriate padding. Ensure color-coded badges and concern levels have professional appearance with proper spacing. Add smooth hover transitions.

Configure theme.boxShadow with professional shadow scales (sm, md, lg, xl) suitable for card elevation. Define consistent theme.borderRadius values (rounded-lg, rounded-xl, rounded-2xl) for cards and components. Add theme.transitionDuration presets for smooth animations.

requirements.summary: Refine button design with professional styling, clear variants, smooth transitions, and polished loading states
acceptanceCriteria: All buttons have consistent sizing, padding, and border radius
Button variants (primary, secondary, ghost) are clearly distinguishable
Hover and active states include smooth transitions
Loading states are professional and visually polished
Disabled states are clearly indicated with appropriate opacity

file_operations.description: Apply professional button styling with refined padding (px-6 py-3), consistent border-radius (rounded-full or rounded-lg), appropriate font-weight (font-semibold), and smooth transitions (transition-all duration-200). Differentiate login vs logout states with clear primary/secondary variants. Add professional loading state styling with spinner animation. Ensure disabled state uses opacity-50 with cursor-not-allowed.

Apply professional button styling consistent with LoginButton. Use secondary or ghost variant as appropriate. Add loading state with professional spinner. Ensure hover effects include smooth transitions and appropriate visual feedback.

Apply professional button styling consistent with other buttons. Implement loading state during data fetching and export generation. Add smooth hover and active state transitions with appropriate visual elevation.

Define base button styles in @layer components with variants for primary, secondary, tertiary, and ghost buttons. Include professional padding, border-radius, font-weight, and transition properties. Define hover, active, focus, and disabled state styles with appropriate transforms, shadows, and opacity.

requirements.summary: Enhance form inputs with professional styling, refined focus states, and consistent validation feedback
acceptanceCriteria: All form inputs have consistent styling with refined borders and focus states
Placeholder text uses appropriate opacity and professional tone
Validation errors display with clear, professional messaging
Focus states include smooth transitions and visible indicators
Input fields maintain professional appearance across all pages

file_operations.description: Apply professional input and textarea styling with refined borders (border-2), consistent border-radius (rounded-lg), appropriate padding (px-4 py-3), and professional focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary). Ensure placeholder text uses muted color with appropriate opacity. Add smooth transition effects. Style radio buttons and checkboxes professionally with custom styling if needed.

Apply professional input styling to ingredient textarea with refined borders, focus states, and placeholder styling. Ensure validation feedback (if any) displays with professional error messaging and appropriate color coding. Add smooth transitions for focus and validation states.

Apply professional search input styling with refined borders, focus ring, and placeholder text. Ensure autocomplete dropdown has professional styling with appropriate shadows, borders, and hover states. Add smooth transitions for focus and dropdown appearance. Style keyboard navigation indicators professionally.

Apply professional input and textarea styling within the modal. Ensure rating input (star selection) has professional appearance with smooth hover and selection states. Style form validation and submission states professionally. Add appropriate spacing between form elements.

Apply professional input styling to the name input field with refined borders, focus states, and placeholder text. Ensure the modal submit button follows professional button styling guidelines. Add validation feedback styling if applicable.

Apply professional input styling to routine name input, product selection dropdowns, and frequency inputs. Ensure all form elements have consistent styling with refined borders, focus states, and appropriate spacing. Add professional validation feedback for required fields.

Define base form input styles in @layer components including professional styling for text inputs, textareas, select elements, radio buttons, and checkboxes. Include refined border styles, focus ring utilities, placeholder styling, and validation state styles (error, success). Add smooth transitions for all interactive states.

requirements.summary: Upgrade Layout header navigation with professional spacing, hover effects, active indicators, and mobile responsiveness
acceptanceCriteria: Header navigation has refined spacing and professional typography
Navigation links include smooth hover effects and active indicators
Mobile menu is well-designed and easy to use
Logo and branding elements are prominently and professionally displayed
Sticky header behavior is smooth and polished

file_operations.description: Apply professional header styling with refined spacing (px-6 py-4), appropriate background with subtle border or shadow, and sticky positioning with smooth scroll behavior. Enhance navigation link typography with appropriate font-weight (font-medium). Add smooth hover effects (transition-colors duration-200) and active link indicators using border-bottom or background highlights. Ensure logo area is prominently displayed with appropriate sizing. Refine mobile menu with professional slide-in animation, backdrop blur, and touch-friendly spacing. Add visual balance between logo, navigation, and LoginButton.

requirements.summary: Refine LandingPage hero section with professional layout, enhanced typography, prominent ProductSearchBar, and polished features section
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section has professional typography with clear visual hierarchy
ProductSearchBar is prominently styled with professional appearance
Call-to-action buttons are visually prominent and polished
Feature cards use consistent professional styling
Overall landing page conveys trust and professionalism

file_operations.description: Apply professional hero section styling with refined typography hierarchy (larger, bolder headings with improved line-height and letter-spacing). Ensure ProductSearchBar is prominently positioned with professional styling. Enhance call-to-action buttons with primary variant styling, appropriate sizing, and prominent placement. Refine features section cards with consistent professional styling matching REQ-82 guidelines. Ensure overall layout uses appropriate spacing and whitespace. Consider referencing the generated hero-bg image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1200x600.png as a subtle background element if appropriate.

requirements.summary: Enhance Dashboard with professional data visualization, refined statistics cards, and polished component layouts
acceptanceCriteria: Statistics cards have professional styling with clear metrics display
Progress indicators and trend charts are visually polished
Analysis history cards have refined typography and spacing
Overall dashboard layout is clean and professional
Empty states are professionally designed with clear guidance

file_operations.description: Apply professional dashboard layout with refined grid spacing. Enhance statistics cards with professional styling including refined shadows, appropriate padding, clear typography hierarchy for metrics, and subtle icon or color accents. Ensure consistent card styling across all dashboard sections. Add professional empty states with appropriate messaging and visual guidance. Refine overall page spacing and section grouping.

Apply professional styling to progress indicators and trend badges. Refine the visual representation of improvement/decline/stable states with appropriate colors, icons, and spacing. Ensure progress bars or visualizations have professional appearance with smooth animations. Add clear typography for metric labels and values.

Apply professional styling to the progress bar visualization with refined colors, smooth gradients, and appropriate border-radius. Ensure color coding for concern levels is professional and distinguishable. Add subtle animations for data updates if applicable.

Apply professional card styling with refined shadows, borders, and spacing. Ensure dismissible functionality has smooth transitions. Style seasonal tips and reminder messages with appropriate typography and visual hierarchy. Add professional icon or visual accent.

requirements.summary: Upgrade DBMSDocumentationPage with refined academic report design, professional section headers, and polished typography suitable for export
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation page uses professional academic report styling
Section headers are clearly hierarchical and well-spaced
Code blocks have professional syntax highlighting
Diagrams are well-integrated with appropriate sizing and spacing
Typography is suitable for formal documentation and PDF export
PDFExportButton is prominently and professionally styled

file_operations.description: Apply professional academic report styling with refined section headers using clear typographic hierarchy (h1, h2, h3). Ensure appropriate spacing between sections using consistent margin and padding. Style code blocks with professional syntax highlighting and appropriate background colors. Integrate diagrams with refined borders, shadows, and captions. Ensure overall typography is suitable for PDF export with appropriate font sizes and line heights. Position PDFExportButton prominently with professional styling. Consider print-specific styles for optimal PDF output.

Apply professional diagram container styling with appropriate padding, borders, and background. Ensure diagram image and entity descriptions have professional typography and spacing. Add refined shadow or border to diagram container for visual elevation.

Apply professional diagram container styling. Ensure SchemaTable components have consistent professional styling with refined borders, spacing, and typography. Integrate the schema-diagram image at frontend/public/assets/generated/schema-diagram.dim_1200x900.png with appropriate sizing and presentation.

Apply professional diagram styling with refined layout, typography, and spacing. Ensure data flow visualization is clear and professionally presented. Integrate the dataflow-diagram image at frontend/public/assets/generated/dataflow-diagram.dim_1000x700.png with appropriate sizing and professional borders or shadows.

Apply professional table styling with refined borders, appropriate padding, and clear typography. Ensure column headers are bold and well-spaced. Style primary key and foreign key icons consistently. Use professional colors for row backgrounds and borders.

Apply professional code block styling with appropriate syntax highlighting, refined borders, and consistent padding. Ensure tab navigation is professionally styled with clear active indicators. Add professional copy-to-clipboard button styling.

Apply professional code block styling consistent with SQLQuerySection. Ensure tabbed interface has professional styling with clear active states. Refine code syntax highlighting and add professional copy-to-clipboard functionality.

Apply professional gallery layout with refined card styling for each screenshot. Ensure images have appropriate borders, shadows, and spacing. Style descriptions, features, and annotations with professional typography and clear hierarchy.

requirements.summary: Improve spacing, margins, and padding consistency across all pages and components for professional whitespace management
acceptanceCriteria: All pages have consistent spacing between sections
Component padding is uniform and professional
Whitespace is effectively used to improve readability
Related elements are visually grouped with appropriate spacing
Overall layout feels balanced and uncluttered

file_operations.description: Ensure root-level layout spacing is consistent. Verify that page transitions maintain appropriate padding and margins. Add professional spacing utilities if needed for overall application consistency.
Apply consistent section spacing with refined padding and margins. Ensure product grid has appropriate gap spacing. Add professional page header styling with clear typography and spacing.
Apply consistent section spacing and page padding. Ensure RoutineList has appropriate spacing between routines. Add professional page header styling with clear hierarchy.
Apply consistent section spacing and page padding. Ensure journal entries have appropriate spacing. Add professional empty state styling with clear messaging and visual guidance.
Apply consistent page spacing and padding. Ensure search bar has appropriate spacing from ingredient grid. Refine grid gap spacing for ingredient cards. Add professional page header styling.

Apply consistent page spacing and padding. Ensure form elements have appropriate vertical spacing. Refine results display spacing with clear separation between sections. Add professional page header styling.
Apply consistent page spacing and padding. Ensure ComparisonTable has appropriate spacing between products. Add professional page header and results section styling with clear visual grouping.
Apply consistent page spacing and padding. Ensure tab navigation has appropriate spacing. Refine article grid spacing and search bar placement. Add professional page header styling.

Configure theme.spacing with consistent scale if needed. Ensure theme.container has appropriate padding presets. Define theme.gap utilities for consistent spacing across grid and flex layouts. Add spacing utilities for consistent page padding and section margins.

requirements.summary: Add professional loading states, skeleton screens, and smooth transitions throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Loading states use professional skeleton screens or refined spinners
Page transitions are smooth and polished
Animations are subtle and enhance user experience
Loading indicators are contextual and well-placed
All transitions maintain the professional aesthetic

file_operations.description: Replace basic loading spinner with professional loading state using refined spinner animation or skeleton screen. Ensure loading indicator has appropriate sizing, positioning, and professional styling with smooth fade-in animation.

Add professional skeleton screen for loading state showing placeholder cards with animated shimmer effect. Ensure loading state matches the final layout of recommendation cards. Add smooth fade-in transition when data loads.
Add professional skeleton screen for loading state with placeholder cards. Ensure smooth transitions when data loads. Add subtle animations for new entries if applicable.
Add professional skeleton screen for loading state. Ensure smooth transitions when routines load. Add subtle animation for delete operations with confirmation feedback.
Ensure ResultsDisplay component has professional loading state. Add smooth page transition animations. Implement skeleton screens for results sections during data fetch.
Add professional skeleton screens for statistics cards and dashboard sections during loading. Ensure smooth fade-in transitions when data populates. Add subtle animations for interactive elements.
Add professional skeleton screen for loading state showing placeholder product cards. Ensure smooth transitions when favorites load and when products are removed.
Add professional skeleton screen for loading state showing placeholder ingredient cards. Ensure smooth transitions when ingredients load and during search filtering.

Define professional loading spinner animation using @keyframes. Create skeleton screen shimmer effect using gradient animation. Define smooth page transition animations. Add subtle micro-interaction animations for buttons and interactive elements. Ensure all animations use appropriate easing functions and durations for professional feel.

Configure theme.animation with professional loading spinner, shimmer effect, and transition presets. Define theme.transitionTimingFunction with appropriate easing curves. Add theme.transitionDuration scales for consistent animation timing across the application.
